scripts.build: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.test:run: coverage run manage.py test; npm --prefix frontend test -- --watchAll=false --runInBand --detectOpenHandles
scripts.test:coverage: coverage html; coverage xml; npm --prefix frontend test -- --coverage --watchAll=false --runInBand; echo ''; echo 'Coverage reports generated:'; echo '  Backend HTML: htmlcov/index.html'; echo '  Backend XML: coverage.xml'; echo '  Frontend HTML: frontend/coverage/lcov-report/index.html'; echo '  Frontend LCOV: frontend/coverage/lcov.info'
